name: Floreo
tagline: Autonomous compounding journal with local storage and open connections
description: Autonomous life journaling with compound metrics, local storage, and open service connections. Auto-detects activities, tracks compounding streaks/trends/velocity, syncs with Notion/GitHub/Calendar. Privacy-first with granular controls.

features.title: Autonomous Activity Detection
features.description: Auto-detect git commits, calendar events, file changes via optional watchers

features.title: Open Service Connections
features.description: Sync with Notion, GitHub, Calendar APIs (opt-in, API key required)

features.title: 6 Life Domains
features.description: Track work, health, learn, relate, create, reflect

features.title: Compound Metrics System
features.description: Track metrics that compound over time — streaks, trends, velocity, healthspan scores

features.title: Cross-Domain Correlations
features.description: Discover patterns like '40% more productive on exercise days'

features.title: Local-First Storage
features.description: Primary data stored locally, external sync optional

features.title: Configurable User Name
features.description: Set and change your name anytime — no data lock-in

features.title: Privacy Tiers
features.description: Granular privacy controls with opt-in/opt-out for each feature

features.title: Automated Analysis
features.description: Scheduled shell scripts for insights and reporting

changes: Version bump to 0.2.1 — consistency across all files

Autonomous activity detection — git commits, calendar, file watchers
Open service connections — Notion, GitHub, Calendar API sync
Configurable user name — set and change anytime
Privacy controls — granular opt-in/opt-out for all features
Longevity & healthspan tracking with automated analysis
Compound metrics system with scheduled reporting
6 life domains (work, health, learn, relate, create, reflect)
